_doc: Specs HSV PAR CAMERA (D12). cam_0 et cam_1 partagent la spec calibree sur cam_0 (paire stereo, detection coherente requise). cam_2 (eye-in-hand) a sa propre spec : sa reponse est plus delavee/lumineuse, une spec partagee echoue (voir analyse 2026-06-16). Format retro-compatible : sans 'specs_by_cam', le loader retombe sur 'specs' (global). Backup flat: hsv_specs.flat_cam0_20260616.backup.json

cam_0.label: orange_cube
cam_0._diagnostic: H median=8, S median=160, V median=199

cam_0.label: purple_cylinder
cam_0._diagnostic: H median=128, S median=139, V median=127 (RESTAURE depuis la calib precedente ecrasee par --overwrite) | s_lo 103->63 (robustesse cam2, balayage adversarial)

cam_0.label: blue_rectangular_box
cam_0._diagnostic: H median=117, S median=181, V median=124

cam_0.label: black_triangular_prism
cam_0._diagnostic: V median=44, max=163, v_hi retenu (median*1.8 clamp [45,100]) = 79

cam_0.label: light_blue_ball
cam_0._diagnostic: H median=105, S median=186, V median=127 | AJOUTE a hsv_specs.json sur demande. ATTENTION: meme teinte que les pinces (H~100) -> confusion cam2 attendue.
